docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $484.56 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA, VILMA I. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
